# ipmitool Provider

Manage BMC/iDRAC hardware via IPMI 2.0 (LAN+) by wrapping the ipmitool CLI.

Resources can override any of these fields per-host for multi-BMC fleets.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number) RMCP+ cipher suite ID. Defaults to 3 (RAKP-HMAC-SHA1) for compatibility with older Dell 11G BMCs. Set to 17 on modern hardware.
- `host` (String) Default BMC IP or hostname. Resources may override.
- `interface` (String) ipmitool interface: lanplus (default), lan, or open.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Default IPMI password.
- `port` (Number) Default IPMI UDP port. Defaults to 623.
- `timeout_seconds` (Number) Per-call timeout for ipmitool subprocess. Defaults to 60s — older BMCs are slow on `sdr list` (full SDR iteration).
- `username` (String) Default IPMI username.
